route_resolver.note: This is the live web redirect-intent entrypoint used by /search submissions.

ranked_results.note: This is the live ranked result helper used by the web explore page.

audit_summary.harness_strategy: The harness calls both audited functions directly. resolvePublicSearch captures the live /search routing decision, and getExploreRows captures the live ranked result list. A runtime stub for @/lib/supabase/server is used only to replace Next cookie wiring; resolver logic and DB query behavior are unchanged.

recommendations.label: variant token handling weak
recommendations.recommendation: Promote variant and finish tokens such as alt art, rainbow, holo, and gold in ranking inputs instead of relying on name matches alone.
